_comment: EDCH service inventory and source of truth for the suite. Add a service = one entry. 'envs' maps an environment name to a base URL. Only PUBLIC prod URLs live here; non-public instance URLs (e.g. a partner test/staging host or a local DDEV copy) are supplied at runtime via env vars named EDCH_<NAME>_<ENV>_URL (e.g. EDCH_REGISTRY_TEST_URL) — or GitHub Actions repository variables — so internal infra stays out of this public repo. A missing env falls back to prod.
